meaning: n.表示,向征,记号,代币adj.象征的,表意的
examples: We charge only a token fee for use of the facilities.
The government agreed to send a small token force to the area.
The penalty for failure will be high. But, by the same token, the rewards for success will be great.
When approaching your 40th birthday, there are a few token paths you might consider.
Mostly, that means they sit in the token booth and stare out the window.
